title: K-200 Airframe Risk Register
text:
# K-200 Airframe Risk Register

Document number: MD-DOC-405-A. Revision: A. Type: analysis. Author: Tyler Moss. Created: 2024-04-04. Last modified: 2025-02-06. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Airframe subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1093.
